title: OXFORD HOUSE - 211info
text: OXFORD HOUSE OF OREGON OXFORD HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing for women and men in recovery from alcohol and drug addiction. There is no time limit for residency. Each resident is responsible for membership dues, and residents share household responsibilities. Houses are democratically run. There are no house managers or supervisors. Each house has an elected board, and weekly house meetings are conducted to discuss business, policies, etc. Website Portland, OR 97290 Eligibility: Must be or desire to be drug and alcohol free and be able to pay a share of rent and household expenses Hours: Varies by site Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Monthly expenses range from $450-$550 per person depending on the location and house. This covers a share of the rent, utilities, and household supplies. There is a non-refundable membership fee that ranges from $100-$200 depending on each house. DOCUMENTS: Completed application AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Sober Living Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OXFORD HOUSE OF OREGON
